raise_justifications.backend/database/conversations.py: Public shared-chat uses the existing conversation storage format for bounded, safe transcript decoding; extraction would duplicate crypto/storage invariants. The transactional bulk_assign_segment_speakers helper must sit beside update_conversation_segment_text because it reuses this module's private _prepare_conversation_for_read/_prepare_conversation_for_write encryption boundary and conversations collection handle; extracting it would export those internals.
